title: Opening for Software Engineer at NoBroker

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at NoBroker
jsonLd.description:
Join the NoBroker family as a Software Engineer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
